---
title: "The Rev. James Edward Austen Leigh"
---

## The Rev. James Edward Austen Leigh

**Dates:** (1794-1874)

### Description

nephew and biographer of Jane Austen

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 30th 1872
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
